summary: Round 3 passes all gate checks: cargo check clean, 0 clippy warnings, 1767 tests pass across all suites (0 failures, 3 ignored). 10 fixes applied across 12 source files (+487/-12 lines). Error-handling wins: (1) From<io::Error> now preserves ErrorKind — NotFound→AvaError::NotFound, PermissionDenied→AvaError::PermissionDenied, TimedOut/WouldBlock→AvaError::TimeoutError (retryable), all other kinds→IoError legacy fallback; all 10 legacy string variants received deprecation doc comments with migration guidance; (2) ProjectState::save() changed from Result<(), String> to ava_types::Result<()>, propagating structured AvaError::from conversions; (3) run_validation_tool/run_post_edit_validation chain changed from Result<ToolResult, String> to ava_types::Result<ToolResult>, eliminating map_err(|e| e.to_string()); (4) regexes_compile() test added to ava-praxis::review for RE_DIFF_STAT and RE_ISSUE LazyLock<Regex> statics. Testing wins: (5) permission_middleware.rs gains 5 new tests covering deny propagation, Ask-without-bridge fallback, user rejection via bridge, auto_approve bypass, and after() passthrough; (6) web_fetch.rs gains regexes_compile() test for 5 LazyLock<Regex> statics; (7) relevance.rs gains regexes_compile() test for RE_FILE_PATH; (8) budget.rs gains 9 unit tests for BudgetTelemetry (cost accumulation, threshold warning dedup, exhaustion detection, label formatting). Test count grew 1750→1767 (+17 new tests). Critical count reduced from 5 (R2) to 3: permission_middleware test gap closed (was critical #2 in R2 focus list), AvaError From<io::Error> and ProjectState::save fixed (were critical #3/#5). Remaining 3 criticals: (a) no agent loop integration tests for run_unified() 325-line function; (b) fire-and-forget spawns in ava-tui agent.rs still lack error surfacing (requires AgentStack method signature changes); (c) codebase index JoinHandle dropped silently in stack/mod.rs (requires structural AgentStack field change). Warnings estimate reduced from 45 to ~37 as 8 warning-level items addressed: LazyLock regex unwrap test gaps (review.rs, web_fetch.rs, relevance.rs), error type erasure in tool_execution and config, permission middleware test gaps, budget module coverage, and io::Error kind preservation.
focus_next_round: quality: crates/ava-agent/src/agent_loop/mod.rs — run_unified() is 325 lines with zero integration tests; extract handle_steering_queue(), handle_stuck(), process_turn_result() and add mock-provider smoke tests covering at least: (a) normal completion, (b) steering-queue interruption, (c) stuck-loop detection, (d) tool-error self-correction path

async: crates/ava-tui/src/state/agent.rs — fire-and-forget spawns for set_thinking_level/cycle_thinking/set_mode silently swallow errors; change AgentStack methods to return Result and surface errors to TUI via AppEvent::Error
async: crates/ava-agent/src/stack/mod.rs — codebase index JoinHandle is dropped (silent failure); add JoinHandle field to AgentStack and poll it with timeout before first codebase_search invocation
style: crates/ava-agent/src/stack/stack_run.rs — run() is ~455 lines; extract build_agent_loop() and run_with_loop() helpers to reduce orchestration to ~100 lines and improve testability

reference-alignment: crates/ava-types/src/error.rs — AvaError dual-personality (10 deprecated legacy + 11 structured variants) still coexists; write migration guide in doc comment on the enum itself and track conversion of call sites away from legacy variants across the codebase
safety: audit remaining LazyLock<Regex>.unwrap() usages across all crates not yet covered (ava-agent, ava-llm, ava-session, ava-permissions, ava-sandbox) and add regexes_compile() tests
error-handling: crates/ava-agent/src/stack/mod.rs — ProjectState::load() error path still silently ignores parse failures in some arms; audit and ensure structured AvaError propagation end-to-end
